title: Adrián Zancajo
text: I am a ‘Ramón y Cajal’ Researcher at the Department of Sociology of the Autonomous University of Barcelona and a member of the research group Globalisation, Education and Social Policies (GEPS)

title: Research
text:
Bonal, X., Pagès, M., Verger, A., & Zancajo, A. (2023). Regional policy trajectories in the Spanish education system: Different uses of relative autonomy. Education Policy Analysis Archives, 31.
Aldinucci, A., Valiente, O., Hurrell, S., & Zancajo, A. (2023). Understanding aspirations: why do secondary TVET students aim so high in Chile?. Journal of Vocational Education & Training, 1-22.





Zancajo, A., Verger, A., & Fontdevila, C. (2022). The instrumentation of public subsidies for private schools: Different regulatory models with concurrent equity implications. European Educational Research Journal, 21(1), 44-70.

title: Research
text:
Book chapters

2023

Bonal, X., Fontdevila, C., & Zancajo, A. (2023). The World Bank and education in a changing global arena. In R. J. Tierney, F. Rizvi, & K. Ercikan (Eds.), International Encyclopedia of Education (Fourth Edition) (pp. 480–487). Elsevier
Verger, A., Fontdevila, C., & Zancajo, A. (2023). The privatization of education. Drivers, social effects and regulatory challenges of private sector participation in schooling. In R. J. Tierney, F. Rizvi, & K. Ercikan (Eds.), International Encyclopedia of Education (Fourth Edition) (pp. 174–182). Elsevier
Zancajo, A., Fontdevila, C., & Verger, A. (2023). Markets in Education and School Segregation: Paths of Problematization and Reform. In: M. Verhoeven, J. Corvalán, V. Durpiez, & J.P. Valenzuela (Eds.) Education Markets and Segregation. Cham: Springer.



2022

Zancajo, A., Verger, A., & Fontdevila, C. (2022). Educational Privatization: Expanding spaces and new global regulatory trends. In: F. Rizvi, B. Lingard, & R. Rinne (Eds.) Reimagining Globalization and Education (pp. 105-119). London: Routledge.



2019

Zancajo, A., & Valiente, O. (2019). Evolución de las políticas de ETP en Chile: entre el capital humano y el derecho a la educación. In L. Sepúlveda & M.J. Valdebenito (Eds.) Educación Técnico Profesional ¿Hacia dónde vamos?: políticas, reformas y nuevos contextos de desarrollo. Ediciones Universidad Alberto Hurtado: Santiago de Chile.



2018

Bonal, X., & Zancajo, A. (2018). School segregation in the Spanish quasi-market education system: local dynamics and policy absences. In X. Bonal & C. Bellei (Eds.) Understanding school segregation: patterns, causes and consequences of spatial inequalities in education (pp. 201-220). London, UK: Bloomsbury.
Verger, A., Zancajo, A., & Fontdevila, C. (2018). Experimenting with educational development: International actors and the promotion of private schooling in vulnerable contexts. In G. Steiner-Khamsi & A. Draxler (Eds.), The State, Business and Education: PPPs Revisited (pp. 16-38). Cheltenham UK/Northampton, MA: Edward Elgar.



2017

Fontdevila, C., Verger, A., & Zancajo, A. (2017). Taking advantage of catastrophes: education privatization reforms in contexts of emergency. In T. Koinzer, R. Nikolai and F. Waldow (Eds.) Private Schools and School Choice in Compulsory Education. Global Change and National Challenge (pp. 223-244) Wiesbaden, Germany: Springer VS.
Verger, A., Fontdevila, C. and Zancajo, A. (2017). Privatization by Default in Low-Income Countries: The emergence and Expansion of Low-Fee Private Schools. In A. Verger, H.K. Altinyelken & M. Novelli. Global Education Policy and International Development. New Agendas, Issues and Policies (2nd edition) (pp. 255-276). London, UK: Bloomsbury Academic.



2013

Ferrer, F.; Castejón, A., & Zancajo, A. (2013). Joventut i educació en temps de crisi. In P. Serracant, P. (Ed.). Enquesta de joventut de Catalunya 2012. Barcelona: Departament de Benestar i Família.

title: Research

2016

2015

2014

2011
